channel.title: Daily News (Personal Briefing)
channel.description: A personal morning news briefing covering AI, marketing, higher education, Canadian policy, BC local news, and global business.
channel.itunes:author: Daily News

item.title: Daily News for Tuesday, May 19, 2026
item.description: Three threads deserve your full attention today, Midya. First, the Musk-Altman trial wrapping up on procedural grounds is more than tech drama — it's a public trust signal that should shape how you position AI advisory work with risk-averse institutions like Canadian universities...
